payload.tactic: while (c{1} = c{2} /\ i{1} = i{2} /\ n{1} = n0 /\ size p{1} = size p{2} /\ 1 <= i{1} /\ size c{1} + size p{1} <= max_cipher_size /\ (p{1} = [] \/ size c{1} = (i{1} - 1) * block_size) /\ mr0 = ROin.m{1} /\ ms0 = ROout.m{1} /\ (forall (c0 : C.counter), (n0, c0) \in ROF.m{1} => C.toint c0 < i{1}) /\ (forall (n1 : nonce) (c0 : C.counter), (n1, c0) \in ROF.m{1} => n1 \in n0 :: BNR.lenc{1})).
